quests.name: The Awakening
quests.description: You awaken in the Verdant Grove with no memory. The Elder says the Sap has chosen you. Prove yourself by defeating the forest creatures that have turned hostile.

quests.name: The Shadow Threat
quests.description: The Elder warns of shadow creatures emerging from the Crystal Caverns. Venture inside and discover what stirs in the darkness.

quests.name: The Crimson Rising
quests.description: Crimson energy surges across the land. The Wardens on the Crimson Plateau have gone mad with power. Put a stop to their corruption.

quests.name: The Nexus Convergence
quests.description: All paths lead to the Nexus Spire. The three streams of Sap converge there. Face the ultimate challenge and restore balance.

objectives.description: Defeat all enemies at the Nexus

quests.name: The Veil Unraveling
quests.description: The Nexus Spire is cleansed, but Seer Althea reveals the corruption was only a symptom. A tear in the Veil between worlds is spreading from deep within the Hollowroot Catacombs. The factions must unite, but old rivalries run deep.

objectives.description: Consult Seer Althea at the Whispering Veil
Convince Commander Briara to commit Bloomguard forces

quests.name: The Siege of Hollowroot
quests.description: With the factions rallied, lead an assault into the deepest chambers of the Hollowroot Catacombs. The Veil Tear must be sealed before whatever lurks beyond breaks through.

objectives.description: Defeat Veil Horrors guarding the tear
Perform the Sealing Ritual at the Veil Tear

quests.name: The Fractured Alliance
quests.description: The seal holds, but barely. The Sporecaller Syndicate has been secretly siphoning Sap energy from the tears for their experiments. Confront Sporecaller Mycel and decide the Syndicate's fate before the corruption spreads further.

objectives.description: Search the Sporecaller Labs for evidence
Decide the Syndicate's fate: Exile, Reform, or Alliance

quests.name: The Unbinding
quests.description: The Ancient Unbinding Site has activated. Something vast and ancient stirs beyond the Veil, drawn by the fractured Sap streams. Unite all factions for a final stand at the Everwood Heart, or the realm of Nexus will be consumed.

objectives.description: Seal the Veil forever or absorb the Void's power

quests.name: Gathering Herbs
quests.description: The Herbalist needs potions ingredients from the Grove. Defeat creatures and collect what drops.

quests.name: Sunken Secrets
quests.description: The Scholar has heard rumors of ancient knowledge hidden in the Sunken Ruins. Explore them and report back.

quests.name: Bloomguard Patrol Duty
quests.description: Commander Briara needs patrols along the Canopy perimeter. Hostile creatures have been testing the city's defenses. Prove your worth to the Bloomguard by clearing the threats.

objectives.description: Report to Commander Briara at the Barracks
Clear hostile creatures from the Canopy perimeter

quests.name: Corruption in the Ranks
quests.description: Briara suspects a Bloomguard officer has been compromised by Veil corruption. Investigate the barracks at night, follow the trail, and bring the traitor to justice before the corruption spreads.

objectives.description: Search the Barracks at night for clues
Follow the corruption trail to the Thornbinder Safehouse

quests.name: The Rite of Renewal
quests.description: Archdruid Veyla requires rare reagents to perform the annual Rite of Renewal, a ceremony that rejuvenates the Canopy's roots. The corruption has tainted the usual gathering sites, so the components must be sourced from dangerous territory.

objectives.description: Gather Moonpetal Blossoms from the Emerald Cascades
Collect Pure Rootsap from the Spindlewood Forest
Attend the Rite of Renewal at the Emerald Sanctum

quests.name: The Great Hunt
quests.description: Beastcaller Yenna invites you to participate in the Wildkin Pact's Great Hunt. A massive corrupted beast, the Thornmaw Alpha, terrorizes the Wildkin Hunting Grounds. Track it, weaken it, and bring it down.

objectives.description: Find Thornmaw Alpha tracks in the Hunting Grounds
Set hunting traps at key locations
Present the trophy to Beastcaller Yenna

quests.name: Volatile Research
quests.description: Sporecaller Mycel offers access to the Syndicate's research in exchange for retrieving volatile Sap samples from the corruption zones. The samples are unstable and must be collected quickly before they dissipate.

objectives.description: Collect a Volatile Blue Sap Sample
Collect a Volatile Crimson Sap Sample
Collect a Volatile Silver Sap Sample
Deliver the samples to Sporecaller Mycel at the Labs

quests.name: The Lost Expedition
quests.description: A Bloomguard expedition went missing in the Hollowroot Catacombs weeks ago. Guard Captain Reyla asks you to find survivors and recover their findings before the catacombs claim them entirely.

objectives.description: Search for survivors of the lost expedition
Clear the path to the exit

quests.name: Relics of the First Keepers
quests.description: Shadowmaster Kael has identified the location of a First Keeper artifact sealed within the deepest chamber of the Hollowroot Catacombs. The artifact could be key to understanding the ancient sealing rituals used to contain the Veil.

objectives.description: Reach the Sealed Chamber in the deep catacombs
Solve the First Keeper's locking mechanism

quests.name: Whispers in the Thicket
quests.description: Innkeeper Maren's niece wandered into the Spindlewood Forest three days ago following strange whispers. The forest is dense and full of predators. Find the child before the Spindlewood claims another soul.

objectives.description: Search the outer Spindlewood for tracks
Drive off Spindlewood Stalkers blocking the path
Find Maren's niece in the deep thicket
Escort the child safely back to the Canopy of Life

quests.name: The Drowning Light
quests.description: A water spirit at the Emerald Cascades has become trapped in a corrupted eddy. The cascading pools are turning dark and the creatures downstream are suffering. Solve the water puzzles to free the spirit before the corruption reaches the Canopy's water supply.

objectives.description: Redirect the upper waterflow to cleanse the first pool
Redirect the lower waterflow to cleanse the second pool
Defeat the Corruption Elemental at the source

quests.name: Shattered Brilliance
quests.description: The crystals of the Glinting Groves are fracturing and emitting unstable energy. Smith Garon needs uncorrupted crystal cores for his work, but the corrupted shards have spawned Crystal Wraiths that guard the grove fiercely.

quests.name: The Spore Lord's Domain
quests.description: Deep within the Mycelium Nexus, a massive fungal entity known as the Spore Lord has begun spreading its influence beyond the caverns. The Sporecaller Syndicate insists it is merely defending its territory, but others fear it has been corrupted. Investigate and end the threat.

quests.name: Shadows of the Past
quests.description: Shadowmaster Kael has been tracking a series of Veil anomalies that mirror events from his own mysterious past. Help him investigate the Whispering Veil and confront the echoes of his former life. If you earn his trust, he may join your cause.

objectives.description: Speak with Shadowmaster Kael about the anomalies
Investigate the Whispering Veil with Kael
Help Kael face his past: Forgive or Condemn

quests.name: Call of the Wild Heart
quests.description: Beastcaller Yenna's bonded companion, a great hawk named Skycrest, has been captured by poachers operating out of the Spindlewood Forest. Help her track the poachers and free Skycrest to earn Yenna's loyalty as a companion.

objectives.description: Speak with Beastcaller Yenna about Skycrest
Find poacher camps in the Spindlewood Forest
Defeat the Poacher Leader and guards

quests.name: The Seer's Burden
quests.description: Seer Althea's visions have become overwhelming since the Veil began tearing. She needs help performing a dangerous ritual at the Veil Echo Chamber to stabilize her sight. The ritual will reveal dark truths about the realm's future and bind Althea to your cause.

objectives.description: Speak with Seer Althea about her failing visions
Gather Veil-Touched Herbs from the Corruption Quarantine Zone
Escort Althea to the Veil Echo Chamber
Defend Althea during the ritual against Veil Phantoms
Help Althea complete the Stabilization Ritual

quests.name: Veil Dust Gathering
quests.description: The Emerald Coven needs Veil Dust for a purification ritual. Gather it from Veil Wisps in Silver Sap zones.

objectives.description: Collect Veil Dust from Veil Wisps
Deliver the dust to the Emerald Sanctum

quests.name: Rot Grub Infestation
quests.description: Rot Grubs have overrun a storage cellar near the market. Clear them out before they spread.

objectives.description: Defeat Rot Grubs in the cellar
Report to the merchant who posted the notice

quests.name: Canopy Stalker Menace
quests.description: Hunters report Canopy Stalkers preying on travelers in Spindlewood. Thin their numbers.

quests.name: A Moss Golem's Heart
quests.description: An alchemist needs a Moss Heart for a potent restorative. Moss Golems dwell in the deepest groves.

objectives.description: Obtain a Moss Heart from a Moss Golem
Deliver the heart to the alchemist

quests.name: Blight Hound Pack
quests.description: A pack of Blight Hounds has been sighted near Hollowroot. Eliminate them before they grow bolder.

quests.name: Sap Ghost Banishment
quests.description: Sap Ghosts are draining travelers on the road to the Sanctum. The Coven requests their banishment.

quests.name: Thorn Harrier Clearance
quests.description: Thorn Harriers are blocking the path to the Wildkin hunting grounds. Clear a safe route.

quests.name: Trial of the Root Sentinel
quests.description: The Wildkin speak of a Root Sentinel that guards an ancient seed. Defeat it to prove your worth and claim the seed.

quests.name: Veil Watcher's Ritual
quests.description: A Veil Watcher asks you to gather ingredients for a calming ritual near a thin place.

objectives.description: Deliver herbs to the Veil Watcher

quests.name: Ironbark Smith's Order
quests.description: The Ironbark Smith needs rare ore to complete a commission.

quests.name: Canopy Scout Recon
quests.description: Scout Brin needs someone to survey the eastern canopy for enemy movement.

quests.name: Healer Mora's Supplies
quests.description: Healer Mora is low on healing herbs. Gather them from the grove.

quests.name: Keeper Lynn's Lore
quests.description: Keeper Lynn seeks a lost scroll from the Hollowroot catacombs.

objectives.description: Find the Lost Scroll in Hollowroot

quests.name: Blight Hound Cleanup
quests.description: Blight Hounds have been sighted near the Sapling Workshop. Clear them out.

objectives.description: Defeat Blight Hounds near the workshop

quests.name: Sap Weaver's Charm
quests.description: The Sap Weaver will craft you a charm in exchange for crystals and moonpetals.

quests.name: Watcher Cole's Warning
quests.description: Watcher Cole has spotted corrupted movement in the deep woods. Investigate and report.
